# The Bear gives James maps

Priority: Consideration
Products: TWOLD (../Data/Products/TWOLD%20e028aa0786f5449984a4f497c1d746fa.md)

First the Bear gives James a map of [The Asylum](../Data/Locations/The%20Asylum%2084234f68b64e4530836706622d4bde1b.md).

Later, while James’ is planning his exit strategy, he asks the Bear for a map of the surrounding [The City of Orphans](../Data/Locations/The%20City%20of%20Orphans%2079bb690186294ddfbd417bfcc108b5ac.md).
